actions.human_reason: Open the prioritized owner command queue generated from Tower posture, incidents, inbox items, route health, and checkpoint health.
actions.soulaana_translation: Soulaana: Start with the owner command queue.
actions.title: Open Owner Action Center

actions.human_reason: Review the owner posture summary across guards, inbox, incidents, escalation, and command health.
actions.title: Open Security Watch

actions.human_reason: Go to the preferred owner command room.
actions.title: Open Unified Security Command

actions.human_reason: Confirm the preferred Security Command route and fallback routes.
actions.title: Review Preferred Destination

actions.human_reason: Review object permission visibility in the composed Security Command smoke page.
actions.title: Review Object Visibility

actions.human_reason: Review protected route coverage and high-risk gaps.
actions.title: Review Route Guard Status

actions.human_reason: Open the older Security Command route kept as fallback.
actions.title: Review Legacy Security Command

actions.human_reason: Review the owner security inbox queue.
actions.title: Open Security Inbox

actions.human_reason: Review inbox item states, receipts, and open review counts.
actions.title: Review Inbox States

actions.human_reason: Apply a safe owner review state to an inbox item.
actions.title: Apply Inbox Review Action

actions.human_reason: Review Security Inbox filters, priorities, high-risk counts, and open-review views.
actions.title: Review Inbox Filters

actions.human_reason: Review formal Tower security incidents, severity, status, and receipts.
actions.title: Open Incident Desk

actions.human_reason: Apply a safe incident status/severity update to a formal Tower incident.
actions.title: Apply Incident Action

actions.human_reason: Review Incident Desk filters, escalation readiness, high severity items, and next-action counts.
actions.title: Review Incident Filters

actions.human_reason: Review the Incident Desk readiness checkpoint across incidents, escalation, unified UI, quick actions, and route guards.
actions.title: Review Incident Checkpoint

actions.human_reason: Review Security Watch readiness across owner posture, unified UI, quick actions, incident checkpoint, route guards, and object checkpoint.
actions.title: Review Security Watch Checkpoint

human_reason: Owner quick-action rail gives direct access to unified command, preferred destination, security links, object visibility, and route guard status.
soulaana_translation: Soulaana: The owner now has the important Tower buttons in one rail.
